description:
ICICI Lombard Elevate health insurance plan is the most comprehensive health Plan in India.
In this video I have explained the optional 30 riders that you get in this plan.
I have provided a comprehensive overview of all the riders available in this plan. I have thoroughly analysed the terms and conditions, including how each rider works, along with their inclusions and exclusions. 

With the help of these Riders you can customize your help plan according to your requirements, your health condition and your budget.

For UnBiased Insurance Advice: https://up4updates.my.canva.site/ramsingh

100% Claim Settlement Video: https://nas.io/unbiasedadvisor/products/qldp

Timeline 
00.00 - Introduction 
00.33 - Room Modifier 
01:26 - Power Booster 
03:20 - Infinite Care
08:27 - Jumpstart (PED waiting period reduction)
10:35 - How to get 100% claim Settlement 
12:05 - Health Check-up 
12:51 - Deductible Option 
14:48 - Maternity benefit and newborn baby coverage 
16:22 - Policy Porting 
17:46 - Conclusion

#icicielevate #icicilombard #healthinsuranceplans #healthinsurancereview #healthinsurance

chapters.title: Maternity benefit and newborn baby coverage

comments.text:
In ICIC Elevate we have lowest category of single private AC room as a inbuilt benefit 

In add-on, we have two options 
1. Upgrade (no room rent limit.)
2. Down. (Limited to sharing room)


If you want more details before your purchase we can do one to one consultation for more details. Check the link and description.

Just like guaranteed bonus, you get in this policy by 20%.
